channel.title: Bilibili on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Bilibili on yexca'Blog

item.title: Check Bilibili Registration Time (Precise to the Second)
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash 1. Get the Timestamp Open this page: https://member.bilibili.com/x2/creative/h5/calendar/event?ts=0 Press CTRL+F, type jointime, and the number after jointime is your timestamp. Copy the timestamp. 2. Convert the Timestamp Go to this website: Timestamp (Unix timestamp) Converter – Online Tool Enter the timestamp in the designated field and click convert. References How an UP shows you how to check your Bilibili registration …
